info.name: mPayhub API - Complete Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for mPayhub payment platform covering all endpoints and flows

item.name: 1. Authentication

request.description: User login with phone and password. Returns JWT tokens.
Verify MPIN for authenticated user.
Send OTP to phone number for password reset or other purposes.
Verify OTP sent to phone number.
Reset password using verified OTP.
Refresh access token using refresh token.
Get current authenticated user details.
Logout current user and invalidate session.

item.description: Authentication endpoints for login, MPIN verification, OTP, password reset, and token management.

item.name: 2. Users

request.description: Get list of users. Filter by role using query parameter.
Create a new user. Requires appropriate role permissions.
Get detailed information about a specific user.

body.raw:
{
    "firstName": "John Updated",
    "lastName": "Doe Updated",
    "email": "updated@example.com",
    "alternatePhone": "9876543212",
    "businessName": "Updated Business Name",
    "businessAddress": "456 New St, City",
    "is_active": true
}

request.description: Update user information. Supports partial updates (PATCH). Admin can update any user, others can only update their subordinates.
Partially update user information. Only send fields you want to update.
Update user password. Password must be at least 8 characters.
Update user MPIN. MPIN must be 6 digits.
Delete a user. Requires appropriate permissions.
Verify PAN number for a user.
Send OTP for Aadhaar verification.
Verify Aadhaar OTP.
Get all subordinate users in the hierarchy.

item.description: User management endpoints including CRUD operations, KYC verification, and hierarchy management.

item.name: 3. Wallets

request.description: Get all wallets for the authenticated user.
Get specific wallet by type (main, commission, bbps).
Get transaction history for a specific wallet.

item.description: Wallet management endpoints to view balances and transaction history.

item.name: 4. Fund Management

request.description: Load money into main wallet using payment gateway.
Get list of load money transactions with filters.
Initiate payout to bank account. Requires MPIN verification.
Get list of payout transactions with filters.
Get available payment and payout gateways.

item.description: Fund management endpoints for loading money and payouts.

item.name: 5. BBPS (Bill Payments)

request.description: Get all bill payment categories.
Get billers for a specific category.
Fetch bill details from BBPS provider.
Pay a bill through BBPS. Requires MPIN verification.
Get list of bill payments with filters.
Get detailed information about a specific bill payment.

item.description: BBPS (Bharat Bill Payment System) endpoints for bill payments.

item.name: 6. Contacts

request.description: Get list of contacts with optional filters.
Create a new contact.
Get detailed information about a specific contact.
Update contact information.
Delete a contact.
Search for a contact by phone number.

item.description: Contact management endpoints for CRUD operations and search.

item.name: 7. Bank Accounts

request.description: Get list of bank accounts with optional filters.
Validate bank account and get beneficiary name. Charges ₹3.00 verification fee.
Create a new bank account. Should validate first using validate endpoint.
Get detailed information about a specific bank account.
Update bank account information.
Delete a bank account.

item.description: Bank account management endpoints including validation, CRUD operations.

item.name: 8. Transactions

query.description: Filter by type: payin, payout, bbps, commission

request.description: Get list of all transactions with filters.
Get detailed information about a specific transaction.

item.description: Transaction endpoints to view transaction history and details.

item.name: 9. Passbook

query.description: Filter by service: payin, payout, bbps, commission, bank_verification

request.description: Get passbook entries with filters for service type and date range.

item.description: Passbook endpoints to view account statement and transaction history.

item.name: 10. Reports

request.description: Get pay in (load money) report for date range.
Get pay out report for date range.
Get BBPS bill payment report for date range.
Get commission report for date range.

item.description: Report endpoints for various transaction types and date ranges.

item.name: 11. Admin Panel

request.description: Get list of announcements. Admin sees all, others see only active ones.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "System Maintenance",
    "message": "System will be under maintenance on Jan 1st",
    "priority": "high",
    "target_roles": ["Distributor", "Retailer"],
    "is_active": true
}

request.description: Create a new announcement. Admin only.
Get detailed information about a specific announcement.
Update an announcement. Admin only.
Delete an announcement. Admin only.
Get list of payment gateways. Admin only.
Create a new payment gateway. Admin only.
Get detailed information about a specific payment gateway.
Update payment gateway. Admin only.
Toggle payment gateway status (active/down). Admin only.
Delete payment gateway. Admin only.
Get list of payout gateways. Admin only.
Create a new payout gateway. Admin only.
Get detailed information about a specific payout gateway.
Update payout gateway. Admin only.
Toggle payout gateway status (active/down). Admin only.
Delete payout gateway. Admin only.

item.description: Admin panel endpoints for managing announcements and gateways (Admin only).
